---
title: "Contact"
---

## Get in Touch

I'm always happy to discuss research collaborations, consulting opportunities, or answer questions about InSAR, remote sensing, and geospatial data science.

---

## Professional Inquiries

📧 **Email**: [mohseniaref@uni-potsdam.de](mailto:mohseniaref@uni-potsdam.de)  
📞 **Phone**: +49 1520 5241256  
📍 **Location**: Berlin, Germany

---

## Academic Affiliation

**University of Potsdam**  
Institute of Geosciences  
Karl-Liebknecht-Str. 24-25  
14476 Potsdam, Germany

**Supervisor**: Prof. Dr. Bodo Bookhagen  
📧 bodo.bookhagen@uni-potsdam.de  
☎️ +49 331 977 5779

---

## Connect on Social Media

- 🐦 **Twitter**: [@mohseniaref](https://twitter.com/mohseniaref)
- 🦋 **Bluesky**: [@mohseniaref](https://bsky.app/profile/mohseniaref.bsky.social)
- 💼 **LinkedIn**: [Mohammad Mohseni Aref](https://www.linkedin.com/in/mohseniaref/)
- 💻 **GitHub**: [mohseniaref](https://github.com/mohseniaref)
- 🎓 **Google Scholar**: [Profile](https://scholar.google.com.tr/citations?user=9_00Dy8AAAAJ&hl=en)

---

## Collaboration Interests

I'm particularly interested in collaborating on:

- **InSAR Applications**: Deformation monitoring, atmospheric corrections, time-series analysis
- **Geospatial Data Science**: Large-scale satellite data processing, machine learning for Earth observation
- **Natural Hazard Assessment**: Landslide monitoring, subsidence analysis, earthquake deformation
- **Open Science**: Reproducible workflows, open-source tool development, tutorials and training
- **Applied Projects**: Infrastructure monitoring, environmental assessment, climate change impacts

---

## Consulting & Services

Available for:

- InSAR time-series analysis and interpretation
- Geospatial data processing and automation
- Python workflow development for remote sensing applications
- Technical training and workshops on SAR interferometry
- Data quality control and validation pipelines
- HPC optimization for satellite data processing

---

## Response Time

I typically respond to emails within **1-2 business days**. For urgent matters, please indicate this in your subject line.

---

## Office Hours

For students and collaborators at University of Potsdam:

- **By appointment** - Please email to schedule a meeting
- **Virtual meetings** available via Zoom or Google Meet

---

## Mailing Address

Mohammad Mohseni Aref  
Institute of Geosciences  
University of Potsdam  
Karl-Liebknecht-Str. 24-25  
14476 Potsdam  
Germany

---

## Open to Opportunities

I am actively seeking positions in:

- Remote sensing and Earth observation
- Geospatial data science and analytics
- Research and development (R&D) in geodesy and geophysics
- Data engineering for environmental monitoring
- Academic and industry positions worldwide

📄 [View my CV](cv.qmd) | 🔬 [Research Overview](research.qmd) | 💼 [Projects & Tools](projects.qmd)

---

*Looking forward to hearing from you!*
